name: Harvest Simulator
author: Poki
description: Harvest Simulator invites you to experience the life of a modern-day farmer. Take the wheel of your trusty tractor to harvest a wide variety of crops across vibrant fields. Manage your resources, upgrade your equipment, and overcome real farming challenges in this engaging, realistic simulation. Are you ready to claim this bountiful harvest? How do I play Harvest Simulator? Use your mouse to interact with buttons! Forward: W or the up arrow key Reverse: S or the down arrow key Turn: Use the A and D or left and right arrow keys to turn Camera Adjustment: E Who created Harvest Simulator? Harvest Simulator is created by CAMU. Play their other games on Poki: Fox Island Builder , Lucky Claw Machine , Power Wash Cleanup and Urban Racer ! How can I play Harvest Simulator for free? You can play Harvest Simulator for free on Poki. Can I play Harvest Simulator on mobile devices and desktop? Harvest Simulator can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
